MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, May 12, 2010:
Arnold W. Evje, II, counsel for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.; Jordan San Pedro, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff;
Seth Schreiberg, limited scope counsel for defendant Gerald Johnson, who is also present.

Settlement conference held; case settled. The settlement agreement is filed this day, see scanned document. The May 17, 2010 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (218)
